I frequently use INDmoney for loan repayments, but I am disappointed that it doesn't allow partial or custom amount payments. Currently, the app forces users to pay the full outstanding amount at once. Other payment apps allow us to make smaller advance payments (e.g., paying 200 towards a ₹1000 loan). Adding a flexible payment option where users can enter their own amount would be extremely helpful for managing finances. I hope the INDmoney team implements this feature soon.

I am very grateful to the INDmoney app. I had recently filed a complaint regarding the arrangement of tabs in the app's UI, and I am truly amazed that, on the very next day, my issue was resolved. “The app has useful financial features, but the overall user interface needs serious improvement. The font size is too large, which makes the screen look cluttered and uncomfortable to view. The layout and overall design feel messy and not well-structured. It would be much better if the developers reduce the font size and redesign the layout to make it clean, simple, and easy to understand at first glance. A more organized and minimal interface would greatly improve the user experience.”

SUBJECT: Request to Improve Exit Button Safety and Add Commodity Segment The current one-click exit feature is very sensitive; even while scrolling through positions, an accidental touch can trigger an unintended exit. Introducing an additional confirmation mechanism would significantly improve trading safety. Additionally, the absence of the commodity segment forces users to open another demat account with a different broker. kindly review my request and awaiting your response
